scripts.build: npm run build -w @cover-generator/shared && npm run build -w @cover-generator/cover-renderer && npm run build -w @cover-generator/cli && npm run build -w @cover-generator/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @cover-generator/shared && npm run lint -w @cover-generator/cover-renderer && npm run lint -w @cover-generator/cli && npm run lint -w @cover-generator/web
